summary: Hyunwoo (known as Alley Boss) successfully locates a rebel camp and receives a final order from Aldred to defend Lipa Castle from rebel forces. He decides to livestream the quest, allowing his followers to join him in a massive guild-scale defensive operation, which drastically increases his popularity. During the defense, Hyunwoo and his followers face off against rebel forces and the undead, leading to a intense battle that attracts a massive audience.
key_moments: Hyunwoo receives the final quest to defend Lipa Castle from Aldred.
Hyunwoo livestreams the invitation to his followers, causing his popularity to surge and a massive crowd to gather at the castle.
The defense of Lipa Castle begins against rebel forces and an unexpected wave of undead monsters.
